summary: David, you've now lost 45.6 pounds since starting—that's a remarkable 14.5% of your starting weight, and you're closing in on 270. Over the past two weeks you've lost 1.8 pounds at a steady 0.9 pounds per week, which shows your Mounjaro is working consistently with your efforts. You logged 13 days this period, which kept you accountable and connected to your data. Next week, let's focus on capturing those remaining logging days to hit a full two weeks—your Dexcom and Garmin give you such great insight, and consistent tracking often reveals patterns that support even steadier progress. You're building real momentum here.
